headline: AME Q1 Deep Dive: Defense, Automation, and Acquisition Momentum Shape Growth
summary: Electronic products manufacturer AMETEK (NYSE:AME) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 11.3% year on year to $1.93 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.97 per share was 3.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
